## Checklist

- [ ] I checked the affected plugin files.
- [ ] I checked the affected `plugin.json` files.
- [ ] I checked both `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` and `.agents/plugins/marketplace.json` if metadata changed.
- [ ] I checked README links and installation instructions.
- [ ] I checked that file paths and repository URLs are valid.
- [ ] I verified the category is valid per `rules/category.md`.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm run verify-plugins` and it passed.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm run format:check` (or `pnpm run format` to fix).
